description: Quaid BEIR-style nDCG@10 baseline — Phase 1 (hash-shim embeddings)
note: Phase 1 proxy baseline uses SHA-256 hash-based embeddings on a 5-page synthetic corpus. Replace with BGE-small-en-v1.5 results after first full BEIR run (task 5.7).

nq.note: Requires full NQ dataset download via prep_datasets.sh

fiqa.note: Requires full FiQA dataset download via prep_datasets.sh

synthetic_proxy.note: Phase 1 synthetic corpus. Perfect score expected on 5-page corpus with targeted queries.

history.notes: Phase 1 baseline. Placeholder for Phase 3 full BEIR evaluation.
